refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area by identifying terrain features, detecting obstacles, and representing the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad worksite mapping requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and testability, addressing terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation distinctly.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through simulation and field tests that terrain data is captured correctly, obstacles are detected with required accuracy, and the work-zone is represented in the system map as per specifications.
sub_frs: FR1: Identify and characterize terrain features of the worksite.
FR2: Detect and locate obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant site features in the worksite model.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.
DP2: Employ a GIS-based digital mapping framework for work-zone representation.
DP3: Integrate sensor data processing algorithms with real-time data fusion.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.

potential_sources: Sensor data processing tightly coupled with mapping framework
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically separates terrain and obstacle detection from mapping representation, minimizing coupling. Sensor fusion algorithms are modular and can be integrated with GIS mapping.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting mapping quality.
Real-time processing constraints may impact performance.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor fusion and mapping to reduce integration complexity.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical platform responsible for sensor data acquisition and initial processing of terrain and obstacle detection.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Transmits processed terrain and obstacle data to NGHE Solution for further mapping and analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules for real-time updates.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of sensor data processing; low diffusion as data is centralized before transmission.
Receives data for mapping but does not perform sensor fusion; moderate containment.
Minimal involvement; mostly consumer of processed data.
No direct involvement in mapping functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Sensor fusion and initial terrain/obstacle detection are best contained within the Vehicle module to leverage physical sensor integration and reduce data diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential latency in transmitting processed data to NGHE Solution for mapping.
Vehicle module complexity may increase, impacting maintainability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting sensor fusion and mapping functions between Vehicle and NGHE Solution to balance containment and diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are clearly defined and the selected DP logically addresses the terrain and obstacle detection with appropriate sensor fusion techniques.

diffusion_risks: Data transmission latency between Vehicle and NGHE Solution.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment within Vehicle is strong for sensor fusion; mapping representation is expected to be handled by NGHE Solution, maintaining modularity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing sensor data acquisition and processing on Vehicle, and validating data transmission to NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of sensor fusion to Vehicle and mapping to NGHE Solution ensures ownership and interface clarity.

recommended_revisions: Consider defining explicit sub-FRs for mapping representation to assign to NGHE Solution IM.
Assess performance impact of data transmission latency.

decision.justification: While the FR refinement and DP selection are sound, the IM assignment shows potential risks in containment and diffusion that warrant revisiting the architectural partitioning, especially for mapping representation.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Identify and characterize terrain features of the worksite.
FR2: Detect and locate obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant site features in the worksite model.

revise.why: To better separate sensor fusion and mapping representation functions across Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules, reducing complexity and diffusion risks.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensors are available on Vehicle.
Network link supports real-time data exchange.
open_risks: Latency and data loss in telemetry affecting mapping accuracy.
Complexity and maintainability of Vehicle module.
evidence_needed: Performance metrics of sensor fusion on Vehicle.
Latency measurements of data transmission to NGHE Solution.
Verification results of mapping accuracy in NGHE Solution.
